summary: Routing bug from iteration_1 is FIXED. /allocations/new now resolves to the 4-step NewAllocation wizard. End-to-end frontend flow verified: login -> wizard (Details/Bank CSV/Invoice CSV+Mapping/Validate&Run) -> AllocationDetail with 5 tabs and Export CSV -> Manual Link dialog -> Compare -> Debtors -> Audit -> Sign out. 13/13 frontend steps passed.

issues: React hydration warning: <span> rendered as child of <option> in ManualLinkDialog (AllocationDetail.jsx ~line 281). Caused by Emergent dev wrapper injecting span into option text. Not user-visible but pollutes console; consider rendering option label as plain string only.

action_items: Optional: silence React hydration warning by ensuring <option> children are plain strings (e.g. avoid expressions that produce wrapped span in ManualLinkDialog selects).
critical_code_review_comments: App.js now correctly orders static /allocations/new before dynamic /allocations/:id - good.

NewAllocation.detectHeaders posts both CSVs together; on step 2->3 transition invCsv is empty so invoice mapping stays empty until user clicks Auto-detect on step 3. Current flow works because canNext on step 3 enforces invoice mappings, but UX could call detectHeaders again automatically after invoice paste.
Validate step requires v.ok===true to enable Continue. Sample data passes cleanly with 0 errors/0 warnings - verified.
seed_data_creation: One allocation run 'TEST_Run_<timestamp>' created via wizard; not deleted (admin will see it).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 requested features verified working: wizard sample data populates textareas, auto-detect fills all map-* selects (bank_reference=Reference, bank_amount=Amount, invoice_number=InvoiceNumber, invoice_debtor=Debtor, invoice_amount=Amount), validate returns ok=true with 0 errors/0 warnings, submit creates run and navigates to /allocations/{id}. AllocationDetail renders 5 tabs (Full Match=4 rows £3,700 / Partial=0 / Unmatched Bank=1 / Unmatched Invoice=1 / Audit Log) and Export CSV downloads 'allocation-<name>.csv'. Manual Link dialog opens (data-testid=link-dialog) from Unmatched tab. Compare/Debtors (2 number inputs, threshold present)/Audit pages all load. Sidebar Sign out clears auth and redirects to /signin. Single minor: hydration warning in ManualLinkDialog option rendering.
rca of the issue: Previous iteration's critical routing bug was caused by missing explicit static route for /allocations/new. Fix verified: App.js line 51 now declares <Route path='/allocations/new' element={<NewAllocation/>} /> BEFORE line 52 dynamic <Route path='/allocations/:id'>. React Router v6 matches the static path first - 'new' is no longer interpreted as a run id.
